use std::io::Write;

fn format_records(records: &[Record]) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut output = Vec::new();
    for record in records {
        // BAD: new String allocated per record
        let line = format!("{}\t{}\t{}\t{}\n",
            record.id, record.name, record.email, record.score);
        output.write_all(line.as_bytes()).unwrap();
    }
    output
}

struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    email: String,
    score: f64,
}
